name: Reckoner’s Forge
M: w w w w w   w w w w w
w   w   w   w   w   w
w       w m⌈w w w   w
w m⌊    w   w w w w w
w   w w w w w   w   w
w w w w w w w w w w w

m≢.task: {m≢} is the _emerald rune of tallying_, telling how many items lie in the list on its right — a tally-scratch of a rune, counting what it is set before. How many letters are struck into the ingot-mark `w`?

m⌈.task: {m⌈} is the _emerald rune of raising_, lifting the number on its right up to the next whole number, and leaving whole numbers be. The molten readings `v` must each be rounded up to a whole ingot — raise them.

m⌊.task: {m⌊} is the _emerald rune of lowering_, dropping the number on its right down to the previous whole number. Drawing on {d÷}, reckon how many whole times the measure `b` can be drawn from the hoard `a`.

d-.task: {d-} is the _ruby rune of taking-away_, subtracting what lies on its right from what lies on its left. A purse holds `a` coins when a debt of `b` is called in — what remains in each reckoning?

d÷.task: {d÷} is the _ruby rune of sharing_, dividing what lies on its left by what lies on its right. Share `a` coins evenly among `b` hands — what falls to each?
